Login Page
==========

Screen: `/login`

`LoginPage` collects first name, last name and password and calls the backend `/authenticate` endpoint.

Service
-------

`frontend/features/authen/services/account_services.dart::LoginService.authenticate`

Request
~~~~~~~
- POST http://localhost:5000/authenticate
- Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
- Fields: user_fname, user_lname, user_password

Response
~~~~~~~~
- 200 with JSON {"success": true, "user": {...}} on success.
- 401 on invalid credentials.
